name: Virago Four-Port Rum
description: Wonderfully complex & bold, Virago Four-Port Rum opens with notes of vanilla & spice, leading to cascading waves of fig, dried coconut, & crème brûlée, culminating in a pleasantly lingering, smoky finish.

name: Virago Ruby Port Cask Finished Rum
description: FiniThe first in a series of cask-finished products, this expression of Virago offers an intriguingly delicious re-interpretation of our flagship Four-Port Rum. Having spent months in freshly-emptied casks of ruby port from Portugal’s Douro Valley, this spirit exudes an earthy depth, featuring layered notes of campfire, brown sugar, black cherry, pipe tobacco and leather with a finishing hint of candied almond.

name: Virago Cognac Cask Finished Rum
description: Rested for 6 years in 30-year-old Grande Champagne cognac casks, this spirit - the third release in our series of cask-finished rums - is an elegant sipper the color of old gold. Lush aromas of apricot preserve, warm toffee, and honeysuckle harmoniously blend wit h flavors of aged cognac, dark cocoa, and lightly toasted oak to create an extraordinary spirit with a creamy mouthfeel and a long, clean finish.

name: Virago Premium White Rum
description: Lush notes of honeydew and ripened pear perfectly balanced with just the right amount of ester-y funk make Virago 'Premium White Rum' ideal for elevating any cocktail, or for sipping on its own. Deliciously complex; eminently quaffable.

name: Virago Rum 151
description: Virago 151 “High-Proof” Rum boasts a clean yet rich flavor profile with notes of tropical fruit intermingling with earthy esters. An essential ingredient in many classic cocktails and punches, Virago 151 is certain to be a welcome addition to any cocktail bar.

name: Virago Modern Gin with Oolong Tea
description: Lively, layered aromas of cracked peppercorn, freshly-cut grass and cinnamon offer a beguiling introduction to this captivating gin. Presenting a counterpoint to more citrus-forward gins, the palate is suffused with piquant notes of Szechuan pepper balanced against the fragrant herbaceousness of Oolong tea, lemon and grapefruit zest and sweet anise before fading into a long, savory finish.

name: Virago Coffee Liqueur
description: Inspired by Blanchard’s Coffee Roasting Co’s delicious Dark as Dark coffee roast, Virago Spirits endeavored to capture the very essence of that roast in liqueur form. After months of experimentation, we have produced an intoxicating coffee liqueur that delicately overlays the coffee’s oily, smoky notes with rich overtones of dark chocolate and creamy espresso.

name: Virago Karibu Chocolate Liqueur
description: A smooth chocolate liqueur crafted in small batches.

name: Virago Lilith Cranberry Liqueur
description: A cranberry-forward liqueur with a vibrant tart finish.

name: Virago Kali Hibiscus Gin
description: Kali is a refreshingly twist on our original Modern Gin with Oolong Tea. Kali is the perfect gin for summer spritzes, gin and tonics and for updating your favorite gin classics. Intensely ruby in hue, it is saturated with lush notes of piquant hibiscus tea, candied orange peel, and cracked peppercorn layered upon a traditional Juniper base.
